title: Vazoola
html: Stub. Link-building / SEO agency Yahir does contract content work for as part of his bridge income stack post-NaviWell exit. First explicit content-template reference: 2026 03 06 vazoola content examples. Style of guest-post content (8-section structure, white-hat link-building framing) is being used as a model that could be reskinned for Rankett's AI visibility niche.

related.label: Resignation Letter — NaviWell Group (Jan 9 → last day Jan 11)
